Bash(venv/bin/python -c "
from data.fetcher import get_candles
from data.processor import process

df = get_candles\('M15', n_candles=300, symbol='XAUUSD'\)
print\('Raw fetch shape:', df.shape if df is not None else None\)
print\('Columns:', list\(df.columns\) if df is not None else None\)
if df is not None:
    print\('Last 3 rows:'\)
    print\(df.tail\(3\)\)
    print\('Dtypes:', df.dtypes.to_dict\(\)\)
" 2>&1 | grep -v "MetaTrader5\\|yfinance fallback")

Bash(venv/bin/python -c "
from data.fetcher import get_candles
from data.processor import process

raw = get_candles\('M15', n_candles=300, symbol='XAUUSD'\)
df = process\(raw, timeframe='M15', label='TEST'\)
print\('Processed shape:', df.shape if df is not None else None\)
if df is not None:
    print\('Columns:', list\(df.columns\)\)
    print\('Last 3 rows:'\)
    print\(df.tail\(3\).to_string\(\)\)
" 2>&1 | grep -v "MetaTrader5\\|yfinance fallback")
